overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from an open-world game showing a character traversing a dry prairie landscape. The character runs along a cliffside trail beside a flowing river, passing through sparse grasslands with rocky outcrops, eventually stopping at a river overlook. The clip concludes with a sudden scene transition to a different character approaching wooden ranch buildings.

agents.ego_description: character in dark coat running steadily along the cliffside dirt trail beside the river

entered.detail: steep rocky cliff formation running parallel to the trail with layered sedimentary rock
fast-moving river with white water rapids flowing through the canyon below the cliff
tall deciduous tree with green-yellow foliage standing alone in the grassland
hazy blue mountain silhouettes on the horizon beyond the grassland plains

segments.scene_description: The character runs along a narrow dirt trail carved into the cliffside, with a steep rocky cliff face on the left dropping down to a flowing river. The terrain opens into dry grassland plains to the right, dotted with sparse vegetation and a prominent large tree ahead. Distant mountains are visible on the horizon under bright midday sun.

events.description: character slows to a stop at the cliff edge overlooking the river confluence

agents.ego_description: character stands at the cliff edge looking out over the wide river and distant shoreline

entered.detail: wide opening where the river bends and opens into a broader waterway with shimmering surface
far bank of the river with low vegetation and hills visible across the water

segments.scene_description: The character stops at the cliff edge where the trail ends, overlooking a wide river confluence. The rocky cliff recedes into the distance to the left, while the river now dominates the center view, flowing toward a distant shoreline. The large tree from the previous segment is now behind and out of sight.

events.description: sudden cut to different character in plaid shirt approaching wooden buildings in a new location

agents.ego_description: different character wearing a hat and plaid shirt with a rifle on back walking toward ranch buildings

entered.detail: rustic wooden structures with pitched roofs characteristic of a frontier ranch settlement
tall wooden water tower with elevated tank standing beside the buildings

segments.scene_description: The scene cuts to a new location featuring a different character approaching a rural settlement. Wooden ranch buildings and a water tower stand in the distance across an open grassland field, suggesting a frontier or rural environment distinct from the previous riverside cliffs.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey along a rugged cliffside that culminates in a sudden transition to a rural frontier settlement. It begins with a character running along a narrow dirt trail carved into a cliff, with a steep rocky face on the left dropping toward a flowing river and dry grassland plains opening to the right. As the character reaches the end of the path, the camera pauses at the cliff edge to overlook a wide river confluence that dominates the view and stretches toward a distant shoreline. The scene then shifts abruptly from the riverside heights to an open grassland field where a different character approaches a cluster of wooden ranch buildings and a water tower.
